name: Non-consented source through consented intermediary to sink (exclusion mode)
description: Tests the DisableConsentedFlow=true behavior: a non-consented source sends to a sink, but there is a consented avatar (0xa571...) as a possible intermediary. In validation mode, this would require consent rules. In exclusion mode, the pathfinder simply avoids routing through the consented intermediary. Should still find a path via non-consented intermediaries.
notes: Validates that DisableConsentedFlow mode avoids consented intermediaries while still finding valid paths.
